title: crataegus orientalis subsp. orientalis
intro: Crataegus orientalis subsp. orientalis, also known as the Oriental hawthorn, is a subspecies of the Crataegus orientalis plant, a type of hawthorn tree native to the Caucasus region. The medicinal properties of Crataegus orientalis subsp. orientalis include its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and polyphenols, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are numerous, including reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an anti-inflammatory agent. The herbal preparations of Crataegus orientalis subsp. orientalis can be found in various forms, such as capsules, extracts, and teas, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
